data.name: Pixie Pleasures 🧚‍♀️
data.detailed_description:
Aisling stayed home from dew collection because she was feeling melancholy. Bored and lonely, she looks around her village to find out she isn’t the only one who stayed home – and she isn’t the only one with an itch to scratch! Dink the Fae has needs too, and Aisling is more than willing to help!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures in fantasy kingdoms

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Fairy Girl fucked by Futa Pixie

• Girl's and Futa's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 17 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: How could pixies possibly be bored? Yet poor Aisling finds herself exactly that – until she spies Dink the naughty Fae getting busy next door! What is that thick tool between Dink’s legs? And if Aisling asks nicely enough, maybe Dink will let her touch it – maybe even more!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
